tracks.meaning: a network of interconnected computers or devices that communicate with each other
a data structure consisting of nodes connected by edges, or a grid-like arrangement of intersecting lines
an open framework or lattice made of interlocking material such as wire, rope, or metal strips
to interlock or interconnect things together in a network or grid pattern
the interlocking or linking together of body parts or tissue structures
the open latticed structure of a metal object created during casting or fabrication
a difficult or confused situation where multiple elements are tangled together
a network of interconnected organisms or ecological relationships in an environment
